case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMELY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. FRANCISCO JAVIER LOPEZ CABRERA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $55.00 SERVED DEC-14-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ CABRERA, FRANCISCO JAVIER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ CABRERA, FRANCISCO JAVIER $408.76 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $493.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $562.64 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ CABRERA, FRANCISCO JAVIER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
